name: Testimonial Style
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with direct-to-camera speaking, natural hand gestures while talking, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
body_language_block: sincere and authentic body language, natural hand gestures while sharing experience, genuine engagement with camera, casual conversational stance
timing_block: personal story 4-6 seconds, product experience 3-5 seconds, recommendation 2-3 seconds, natural conversational pacing
expression_block: sincere and genuine expressions, authentic emotion when sharing experience, natural eye contact with camera throughout, believable testimonial energy
platform_block: realistic TikTok testimonial style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, authentic personal story pacing, believable recommendation vibe
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no corporate testimonial aesthetic, no overly polished production
